error_signature: Gmail node not attaching PDF from Google Drive
title: Gmail node failing to attach PDF from Google Drive
symptom: The Gmail node does not attach the PDF downloaded from Google Drive to the outgoing email, despite the binary object being present in the output.
not_this_if: Binary data is referenced correctly in the Gmail node
root_cause: In n8n, binary data must be passed directly from one node to the next without interruption. If the download step is not immediately followed by the Gmail node, the binary data may not be accessible, leading to attachment failures.
fix_steps: Move the Google Drive download node directly before the Gmail node in the workflow
Ensure that the binary data is referenced correctly in the Gmail node's attachment settings
Test the workflow to confirm the PDF is attached
agent_instruction: Rearrange the workflow to place the Google Drive download node immediately before the Gmail node.
